'''tadhocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:doc|doc]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:doc|doc]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tadhocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhecheth|tædhecheth]] || [[word:tædhechej|tædhechej]] || [[word:tædhechesh|tædhechesh]] || [[word:tædheche|tædheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhodhochoth|tadhodhochoth]] || [[word:tadhodhochoj|tadhodhochoj]] || [[word:tadhodhochosh|tadhodhochosh]] || [[word:tadhodhocho|tadhodhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhochoth|tadhochoth]] || [[word:tadhochoj|tadhochoj]] || [[word:tadhochosh|tadhochosh]] || [[word:tadhocho|tadhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhofchoth|tadhofchoth]] || [[word:tadhofchoj|tadhofchoj]] || [[word:tadhofchosh|tadhofchosh]] || [[word:tadhofchof|tadhofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhochotho|tadhochotho]] || [[word:tadhochojo|tadhochojo]] || [[word:tadhochosho|tadhochosho]] || [[word:tadhochoko|tadhochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhochoth|tadhochoth]] || [[word:tadhochoj|tadhochoj]] || [[word:tadhochosh|tadhochosh]] || [[word:tadhocho|tadhocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhochothol|tadhochothol]] || [[word:tadhochojol|tadhochojol]] || [[word:tadhochoshol|tadhochoshol]] || [[word:tadhochokol|tadhochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhochothotho|tadhochothotho]] || [[word:tadhochojojo|tadhochojojo]] || [[word:tadhochoshosho|tadhochoshosho]] || [[word:tadhochoko|tadhochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhochothon|tadhochothon]] || [[word:tadhochojon|tadhochojon]] || [[word:tadhochoshon|tadhochoshon]] || [[word:tadhochokon|tadhochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhochothoro|tadhochothoro]] || [[word:tadhochojoro|tadhochojoro]] || [[word:tadhochoshoro|tadhochoshoro]] || [[word:tadhochokoro|tadhochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
